text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This red bean paste is super delish! It's like I'm
fully recharged of my Copa energy! ☆ Where did
you buy this stuff, Acute?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you like it! I got it across the street from
the greengrocer down the road.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Delicious! ♪ This sweetness is recharging my Taru
energy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Is that idol mode I hear?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: It's time for a taruific Tomakomai introduction! ☆ Or something like that...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh my, are you trying to imitate Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Rickeynese is surprisingly full of tips on how to
sell a personality...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: This taiyaki really is a cutie! ♪ Hehe, well I admit this is quite fun.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hokko ☆ hokkori ☆ Hokkaido! ☆ Hmm... Perhaps
it could use a bit more workshopping.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, it wasn't a bad start. I'll let you take it.
Rickey ☆ lucky ☆ fine by me! ☆
